entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop important for energy and nutrition in drylands of sub-Saharan Africa and South Asia.

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: Region where pearl millet is cultivated.

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: Region where pearl millet is cultivated.

entities.name: BLAST
entities.description: A fungal disease, also known as leaf spot, that causes substantial yield loss in pearl millet.

entities.name: MAGNAPORTHE GRISEA
entities.description: The fungal pathogen, also known as Pyricularia grisea, that causes blast disease.

entities.name: YIELD LOSS
entities.description: The reduction in crop productivity resulting from blast infection.

entities.name: STORAGE PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins found in seeds that can have inhibitory action against plant pathogens.

entities.name: DEFENSE PROTEINS
entities.description: Proteins identified in seed extrudes that protect against the growth of Pyricularia grisea.

entities.name: SEED EXTRUDES
entities.description: Extracts from seeds used to identify defense proteins and test their protective effects.

entities.name: CHITINASES
entities.description: Plant defense linked hydrolytic enzymes found in seed extrudes.

entities.name: BETA-1,3 GLUCANASES
entities.description: Plant defense linked hydrolytic enzymes found in seed extrudes.

entities.name: CYSTEINE PROTEASE INHIBITORS
entities.description: Proteins linked to plant defense found in seed extrudes.

entities.name: FUNGAL RADIAL GROWTH
entities.description: A measure of fungal growth inhibited by seed extrudes.

entities.name: FUNGAL DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: A measure of fungal biomass inhibited by seed extrudes.

entities.name: EC50
entities.description: The effective concentration required for 50% fungal growth inhibition.

entities.name: IP 21187
entities.description: A resistant line of pearl millet.

entities.name: ICMR 06444
entities.description: A resistant line of pearl millet.

entities.name: SPORE GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of fungal spore activation, retarded by seed extrudes.

entities.name: INITIAL GROWTH
entities.description: The early growth phase of the fungus, retarded by seed extrudes.

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL CONTROL STRATEGIES
entities.description: Novel strategies for plant defense based on the identified synergistic role of proteins.
